# Bhagavad Karma

> Bhagavad Karma is a charitable organisation based in Bangalore, Karnataka,
> India, promoting spiritual awareness, holistic wellness, education, safety
> and social welfare to uplift mankind. It offers spiritual wellness services,
> runs social-impact initiatives, and welcomes members, donors and volunteers.

This file follows the emerging llms.txt convention: it points AI language
models and answer engines to the site's key pages so they can retrieve,
understand and cite Bhagavad Karma accurately.

- Contact: help@bhagavadkarma.org · +91 89040 72335
- Location: No 6 CKMR Gardens, New Airport Road, Bangalore 560077, Karnataka, India

## About
- [Who We Are](https://bhagavadkarma.org/who-we-are): Mission, values and story of the trust.
- [Our Guru](https://bhagavadkarma.org/our-guru): The spiritual master guiding the organisation.
- [Wisdom](https://bhagavadkarma.org/wisdom): Vedic wisdom and spiritual teachings.

## Services (Spiritual Wellness)
- [Emotional Wellness](https://bhagavadkarma.org/emotional-wellness): Counselling, mindfulness and stress relief.
- [Physical Wellness](https://bhagavadkarma.org/physical-wellness): Holistic health consultations and guidance.
- [Spiritual Wellness](https://bhagavadkarma.org/spiritual-wellness): Aura assessment and sacred rituals.
- [Therapeutic Wellness](https://bhagavadkarma.org/therapeutic-wellness): Energy healing and crystal therapy.
- [Aura Mechanism](https://bhagavadkarma.org/aura-mechanism): Energy-field assessment and chakra balancing.
- [Mystic Kriya](https://bhagavadkarma.org/mystic-kriya): Kriya meditation practices.
- [Little Diamonds](https://bhagavadkarma.org/little-diamonds): Child wellness and youth empowerment.
- [Inner Hush](https://bhagavadkarma.org/inner-hush): Silence and meditation.
- [Yogic Elements](https://bhagavadkarma.org/yogic-elements): Yoga practice and elemental balance.
- [Vedic Food](https://bhagavadkarma.org/vedic-food): Sattvic nutrition and diet guidance.
- [Maha Vashya Shakthi](https://bhagavadkarma.org/maha-vashya): Sacred spiritual practices.

## Act for Good
- [Feed a Monk](https://bhagavadkarma.org/feed-a-monk): Annadanam seva supporting monks.
- [The Vision in Action](https://bhagavadkarma.org/the-vision-in-action-of-bhagavad-karma): Mission and long-term goals.
- [Support for Dharma Samrakshana](https://bhagavadkarma.org/support-for-dharma-samrakshana): Preserving dharma and traditions.
- [Pancha-Anga Karma Vruksham](https://bhagavadkarma.org/pancha-anga-karma-vruksham): The fivefold path of practice.

## Social Impact
- [Environment](https://bhagavadkarma.org/environment): Sustainability and conservation.
- [Farmer Support](https://bhagavadkarma.org/farmer-support): Empowering farming communities.
- [Livelihood](https://bhagavadkarma.org/livelihood): Skill development and economic growth.
- [Rural Healthcare](https://bhagavadkarma.org/rural-healthcare): Health access for rural communities.
- [Social Support](https://bhagavadkarma.org/social-support): Community welfare and relief.

## Get Involved
- [News](https://bhagavadkarma.org/news): Latest updates and announcements.
- [Contact](https://bhagavadkarma.org/contact): Reach the team.
- [Book an Appointment](https://bhagavadkarma.org/appointment): Schedule a wellness session.
- [Become a Member](https://bhagavadkarma.org/member): Join the community.
- [Donate](https://bhagavadkarma.org/donation): Support the mission.

## Store
- [All Products](https://bhagavadkarma.org/allproducts): Wellness and herbal products.
- [Skincare](https://bhagavadkarma.org/store/skincare): Herbal and natural skincare.
